stemHtml: Departing Lille (runways 26 and 20), ATC says: "F-PO, behind the landing Airbus, line up and wait runway 26 behind." What preceded this message?

options.a: "F-PO, report the Airbus on final in sight" and pilot confirmed visual contact.
options.b: "F-PO, report the Airbus on final in sight" and pilot confirmed readiness.
options.c: "F-PO, ready for immediate departure" and pilot readback follows.
options.d: The pilot reads back: "Behind the Airbus, line up and wait, F-PO."
